startUrls.title: Place URLs
startUrls.description: TripAdvisor place URLs to scrape reviews from (hotels, restaurants, attractions)

startDate.title: Start Date
startDate.description: Only include reviews published on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Leave empty for all reviews.

maxReviewsPerPlace.title: Max Reviews per Place
maxReviewsPerPlace.description: Maximum number of reviews to scrape per place (0 = unlimited)

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings for anti-bot protection. Recommended for high-volume runs.
